channel.title: Web on Mechatronics & Cybersecurity
channel.description: Recent content in Web on Mechatronics & Cybersecurity

item.description:
Scanning

Nmap

![[IMG-20260416104640757.png]]

Enumeration

http

![[IMG-20260416105255497.png]]

Fuzzing

![[IMG-20260416111515993.png]]

![[IMG-20260416111535647.png]]

Inspect the login form

![[IMG-20260416112115334.png]]

Exploitation

Flowise - Build AI Agents, Visually exploits

https://github.com/vanhari/CVE-2025-59528 -> RCE https://github.com/AzureADTrent/CVE-2025-58434-59528 ->Unauthenticated Account Takeover

Find the users to use de Unauthenticated Account Takeover

![[IMG-20260416124323547.png]]

Find users

![[IMG-20260416124415065.png]]

The user ben@silentium.htb exist, we can use the exploit

![[IMG-20260416124436346.png]]

Intercept the forgot password process.

![[IMG-20260416131403100.png]]

Password123. -> Created password

![[IMG-20260416131227775.png]] ![[Pasted image 20260416131351.png]] ![[IMG-20260416131331612.png]] ![[IMG-20260416134415663.png]] ![[IMG-20260416134617218.png]]

Docker enviroment Variables
